validation_gates.reason: Repository identity, permissions, default branch, pinned base, target blob, parent and sibling watcher lanes, executable/spec candidates, Flora source registry, connector aliases, fixtures, workflow, Directory Rules, PR contract, and receipt schema were inspected.
The branch was created from main at 01026cd58b1e687c4f8fa3363229b9857613102b and the target blob remained 0a8956cf196db1c1562349baed38bf005dbf261d before mutation.

The change updates an existing tools/ README and freezes the conflicted child lane as documentation-only. No implementation, root, authority home, lifecycle phase, source activation, or public path is introduced. The provenance record uses data/receipts/generated/.

The README surfaces parallel tools, pipelines, pipeline_specs, connector, and source-registry candidates without selecting or duplicating authority.
Historical guarded-live and scheduled-observer commits were inspected, and representative historical scripts, workflows, policies, schemas, and tests were confirmed absent at the pinned current base.

No exact rare-plant locality, herbarium clue, cultural or medicinal knowledge, restoration-sensitive location, private identity, geoprivacy parameter, credential, private endpoint, or reconstructive example was introduced.

One H1, balanced fences, resolved internal navigation, tables, finite outcomes, definition of done, open verification register, evidence ledger, maintenance, correction, migration, and rollback sections were checked.
No private-key block or common GitHub, AWS, or OpenAI token pattern, credential, private endpoint, personal path, or sensitive source payload was introduced.

Only documentation and its provenance receipt change. No executable watcher, connector, pipeline, spec, policy, schema, fixture, test, workflow, source registry, lifecycle, release, runtime, deployment, or public artifact is modified.

Required fields, hash patterns, truth labels, validation outcomes, human-review state, timestamps, artifact-path/hash closure, citations, and notes length were checked against the fetched generated-receipt schema.
Documentation-only change; no watcher, parser, scheduler, source activation, connector, pipeline, policy, schema, fixture payload, test, or runtime behavior changed.
